Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Hardware hotplug events on Linux, the gory details 111 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. Optimizing Recommendation Systems with JDK's Vector API 61 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. A ternary plot of citrus geneology 74 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. OpenTitan Shipping in Production 73 upvotes, 10 comments
  5. Let's Get Physical 90 upvotes, 14 comments
  6. A GitHub Issue Title Compromised 4k Developer Machines 303 upvotes, 69 comments
  7. Show HN: Jido 2.0, Elixir Agent Framework 232 upvotes, 52 comments
  8. GLiNER2: Unified Schema-Based Information Extraction 30 upvotes, 3 comments
  9. Datasets for Reconstructing Visual Perception from Brain Data 46 upvotes, 8 comments
  10. A standard protocol to handle and discard low-effort, AI-Generated pull requests 46 upvotes, 8 comments
  11. Wikipedia was in read-only mode following mass admin account compromise 859 upvotes, 293 comments
  12. The next generations of Bubble Tea, Lip Gloss, and Bubbles are available now 28 upvotes, 4 comments
  13. Converting dash cam videos into Panoramax images 25 upvotes, 4 comments
  14. World-first gigabit laser link between aircraft and geostationary satellite 161 upvotes, 63 comments
  15. Greg Kroah-Hartman Stretches Support Periods for Key Linux LTS Kernels 60 upvotes, 20 comments
  16. Proton Mail Helped FBI Unmask Anonymous 'Stop Cop City' Protester 157 upvotes, 70 comments
  17. CBP tapped into the online advertising ecosystem to track peoples’ movements 211 upvotes, 99 comments
  18. 10% of Firefox crashes are caused by bitflips 210 upvotes, 99 comments
  19. Good software knows when to stop 323 upvotes, 175 comments
  20. A man who broke into jail 102 upvotes, 49 comments
  21. Show HN: PageAgent, A GUI agent that lives inside your web app 70 upvotes, 37 comments
  22. Judge orders government to begin refunding more than $130B in tariffs 750 upvotes, 574 comments
  23. Remotely unlocking an encrypted hard disk 74 upvotes, 45 comments
  24. A rabbit hole in 5 commits 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  25. GPT-5.4 587 upvotes, 512 comments
  26. The Brand Age 196 upvotes, 185 comments
  27. Ethiopia gets $350M World Bank financing for its digital ID project (2024) 20 upvotes, 12 comments
  28. Show HN: Kanon 2 Enricher – the first hierarchical graphitization model 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Launch HN: Vela (YC W26) – AI for complex scheduling 35 upvotes, 37 comments
  30. Structured AI (YC F25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 8:30am, 6 March 2026. Source here.
